warnings: Consumers must preserve the packet uncertainty labels and must not reinterpret unknown values as confirmed coordinates.
ShapedPlugin, Wordfence, and other vendor/reporting domains are legitimate context unless direct evidence separately establishes attacker control; they are not attacker IOCs.
evidence: The normalized profile preserves unsupported or unknown values instead of imputing versions, hashes, infrastructure, victim counts, or attribution.
Legitimate vendor, reporting, and source domains remain evidence or hunt selectors and are not promoted to attacker-controlled IOC fields.
